steps.title: Focus on the advantage
steps.content: The goal is to explain an advantage of onshore wind farms over offshore ones. The relevant notes say offshore farms produce more electricity but cost more to build and maintain.

steps.title: Reject noncomparisons
steps.content:
• Choice B gives only the location of Jaisalmer Wind Park.
  • Choice C explains how wind farms work but not an onshore advantage.
  • Choice D states a shared feature of both types.

steps.title: Name the cost advantage
steps.content: The remaining choice directly compares the two types and identifies the onshore advantage: lower building and maintenance costs. The answer is A.
